title: Array Technologies Builds Momentum With Record Backlog
text: Array Technologies builds momentum with record $2.4 billion backlog of executed contracts and awards following strong Q1 2026 earnings beat. Company achieved 2x book-to-bill ratio for second consecutive quarter. Over 95% of backlog is domestic work, with roughly 50% coming from Tier 1 customers. Approximately 80% of backlog expected to convert within six quarters. New product portfolio showing significant traction: Over 50% of order book comprises products launched within past two years. OmniTrack, terrain-following tracker, surpassed DuraTrack in backlog for first time in Q1 2026, indicating strong market adoption. DuraTrack D2S dual-row tracker launching formally at Intersolar Munich in June 2026 with first commercial deployment already operational in Spain. Management maintains confidence in 2026 guidance despite near-term macroeconomic uncertainties. Company expects to surpass 100 gigawatts of trackers deployed globally in Q2 2026. APA Solar acquisition integration progressing well with new headquarters facility and research center opening.
